
# Ayush Mehrotra — Software Engineer & Full-Stack Developer

> https://ayush-mehrotra-portfolio-two.vercel.app/

## Summary
Ayush Mehrotra is a full-stack frontend engineer from India specializing in building highly accessible, performant web interfaces and type-safe backend systems. 

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Tanstack Query
- Backend & Data: NestJS, tRPC, Bun, PostgreSQL, Prisma, Drizzle
- Infrastructure: Docker, AWS, Vercel, Cloudflare

## Key Experience
- Software Engineer at Wealthfino: Built internal broker-compliance tooling, reducing API response times from 60s to 10s.
- Software Engineer (Part-Time) at Space AI: Shipped core features for an AI-powered email client.
- Freelance Developer: Built custom localized SaaS solutions including the "Up Singh Hospital Patient Management System" and "Dawavale Pharmacy Billing System" in Mau, UP.

## Open Source Contributions
- stablyai/orca: Implemented hierarchical tree views for PR diffs.
- nestjs/nest-cli: Moderated pull requests.
